.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(47, 50, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-container .markdown-rendere.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-content.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(56, 60, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(47, 50, 55) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(50, 53, 59) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #484c53 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#484c53, color-mix(in srgb, #484c53 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #484c53 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#484c53, color-mix(in srgb, #484c53 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(255, 102, 120) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(51, 54, 60) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(56, 60, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(56, 60, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(56, 60, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
